Capabilities

What this HTML includes

This page already has a working offline AI chatbot. It can also be connected to a live Gemini/OpenAI/n8n webhook by updating one config value in JavaScript.

Workflow

Seven steps from idea to intelligent system.

We keep the journey transparent, structured and measurable from discovery through long-term maintenance.

01

Discovery

Goals, users, workflows and success metrics.

02

Blueprint

Architecture, modules, data and integrations.

03

UI/UX

Wireframes, prototypes and polished interfaces.

04

Build

Clean code, APIs, frontend and backend logic.

05

AI Layer

Automation, prompts, knowledge and workflows.

06

Launch

Cloud deployment, testing and training.

07

Scale

Monitoring, support and continuous upgrades.

FAQ

Answers before we start.

Yes. It works offline using a local knowledge base and lead capture flow. It can answer common queries and prepare a WhatsApp project brief.
Yes. Add a secure backend or n8n webhook URL in the CONFIG.aiWebhookUrl value. Avoid placing private API keys directly inside public HTML.
Update the WhatsApp number, email, domain, founder names if needed and connect a real backend if you need true AI instead of rule-based replies.
